hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I craft scalable digital products from concept to deployment — combining precise engineering with thoughtful design to build things that actually matter.

about.p1: I'm a full stack developer with 6+ years of experience building production-grade web applications for startups, scale-ups, and enterprise clients across fintech, SaaS, and e-commerce verticals.
about.p2: My approach sits at the intersection of clean engineering and product thinking — I don't just write code, I ask why we're building it and make sure the answer is good.
about.focus: Building high-performance React applications with Next.js, distributed backend systems with Node.js & Go, and cloud-native infrastructure on AWS.

jobs.desc: Lead engineer on a B2B SaaS platform serving 200k+ users. Architected a real-time collaboration engine, reduced API response times by 64%, and led a team of 4 engineers through a complete frontend rebuild.

Built and maintained core product features for a fintech startup processing $2M+ in daily transactions. Delivered a payments dashboard, webhook infrastructure, and a public API consumed by 300+ third-party integrations.
Developed high-performance marketing sites and e-commerce storefronts for agency clients. Introduced component-driven architecture that cut delivery time by 40% across subsequent projects.

Started career building client websites and internal tooling. Gained strong foundations in semantic HTML, CSS architecture, and JavaScript fundamentals while supporting senior developers on larger projects.

projects.title: Orbit Analytics Dashboard
projects.desc: Real-time SaaS analytics platform with custom data pipeline, live charts, and team collaboration features serving 50k+ monthly active users.

projects.title: Vaultpay Fintech Platform
projects.desc: End-to-end payments infrastructure with KYC verification, multi-currency wallet, and a clean merchant dashboard — processing $1M+ in test volume.

projects.title: Synapse AI Workspace
projects.desc: Collaborative AI-powered note-taking app with semantic search, real-time multiplayer editing, and LLM-assisted writing built on OpenAI's API.

projects.title: Portis CMS Platform
projects.desc: Headless CMS with a visual block editor, multi-locale support, and a CDN-optimized delivery API — serving 10M+ content requests per month.

projects.title: Fleetline Logistics App
projects.desc: Operational dashboard for a logistics company with live GPS tracking, route optimization, driver management, and automated invoice generation.

projects.title: Linkflow API Gateway
projects.desc: High-throughput API gateway with rate limiting, JWT auth, request transformation, and a developer portal — handling 5k+ requests per second at peak.

cases.title: Rebuilding a payment core under live traffic
cases.desc: Vaultpay's monolithic payments handler was becoming a liability — single-threaded, no retry logic, and no observability. I redesigned it as an event-driven microservice with idempotency guarantees, dead-letter queues, and full Datadog instrumentation — deployed with zero downtime using a strangler-fig migration.

cases.title: From 8s load to sub-second: a frontend overhaul
cases.desc: Orbit Analytics was shipping 3MB+ JS bundles and re-rendering entire pages on every filter change. I introduced route-level code splitting, React Server Components, aggressive caching via SWR, and a virtualized table renderer for million-row datasets — without a single API change.

cases.title: Real-time AI collaboration at scale
cases.desc: Synapse needed AI suggestions to stream into a shared document that 50+ users could be editing simultaneously — without conflicts or latency spikes. I built a CRDT-based sync layer with streamed LLM insertions and optimistic UI, then deployed it on edge infrastructure for <80ms global latency.

services.title: Full Stack Development
services.desc: End-to-end product engineering — from database schema and API design to pixel-perfect frontend with seamless deployment pipelines.

services.title: API Design & Integration
services.desc: Clean, well-documented REST and GraphQL APIs with authentication, rate limiting, webhooks, and developer experience built in from day one.

services.title: Performance Engineering
services.desc: Systematic audits and targeted fixes for slow frontends and overloaded backends — from Core Web Vitals to database query optimization.

services.title: Database Architecture
services.desc: Schema design, query optimization, migrations, and data modeling for relational and document databases — at startup and enterprise scale.

services.title: Cloud Infrastructure
services.desc: AWS architecture, containerization with Docker and Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure-as-code with Terraform.

services.title: Technical Consulting
services.desc: Architecture reviews, technology decisions, code audits, and engineering team guidance for startups making critical technical choices.

resume.title: Everything in one place
resume.desc: A comprehensive overview of my experience, technical skills, education, and projects — formatted for both humans and ATS systems.
highlights: Available as PDF, optimized for ATS
